  line is active, if a person is inside the guarded zone, or if model confidence
  is below threshold.
- The deployment team is comparing f16/f16, q8_0/q8_0, q4_0/q4_0, tbq4/tbq4,
  and q8_0/tbq4 KV-cache settings.
